FERC Gas Tariff Section 1 - Service Rates
Original Volume No. 1 Version 60.0.0
Issued on: April 30, 2026                 Effective on: June 1, 2026
STATEMENT OF RATES
Rates Per Dth
 FT IT SS-1
LONG-TERM SERVICE: 1/ 6/
Monthly Reservation Rate 
Maximum Rate $34.5826
Minimum Rate $ 0.0000
Commodity Rate
Maximum Rate $ 0.0100 $ 1.1469 $ 1.1469
Minimum Rate $ 0.0100 $ 0.0100 $ 0.0100
Authorized Daily Overrun Rate
Maximum Rate $ 1.1469
Minimum Rate $ 0.0100
Unauthorized Daily Overrun Rate 2/
Unauthorized Hourly Scheduling Rate $ 1.1469
